---
title: "Girl’s Little Book, The "
---

## Girl’s Little Book, The 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice book
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** London: William Skeffington, 163 Piccadilly.

### Notes

This is an advice book and has been reprinted in the microfilm series Women and Victorian Values, 1837-1910 Advice Books, Manuals and Journals for Women.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
